GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "The Tod's resort 2020 collection celebrates the brand's Italian heritage", "The Italian luxury leather goods brand has released a collection that honours iconic codes of the house.", "Friends and fans of the brand Tod's will find much they want to invest in this season as it welcomes its resort 2020 collection to stores across the globe. For resort 2020, Tod's is focussing on saddlery, one of the most important codes of the Italian luxury brand. The iconic Tod's T Moccasin, gets a modern update, available in calf leather or suede and with or without a stitched T. Another favourite, the Tod's Slipper loafers are rendered in elegant and polished orange leather. The Slipper loafers are crafted with infilature, and feature the Tod's Double T logo. It's time to invest in another of the brand's ever-classic T-logo shoes this season too, and opt for a leather or suede in shades such as vacchetta, mousse or chocolate brown. This season's bags are also lust-worthy editions. The D Bag–a favourite of the late Princess Diana's–will be updated in colourways to match your chosen shoes. The crossbody bag–a favourite of the brand's contemporary fans like Katie Holmes and Sienna Miller–are all crafted with the highest quality leather and are handmade. Craftsmanship and luxury have won the brand such a dedicated following and this continues for resort 2020. Shop the full collection now."
